title: Blood Shed
overview: Loosely based on the true events of a homeless loner who moves into a self-storage facility inhabited by a community of bizarre squatters until they are locked in for the night with a deranged female who hunts them down in search of her lost child.

trailers.title: BLOOD SHED coming out everywhere March 4th, 2014
